chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Revision No. D – 24 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on MA No.599/2024 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on MA No.600/2024 (561-A CrPC) 4. For hearing of main case 19.11.2025 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< None has appeared on behalf of the applicant nor any intimation received; same was the position on the last five consecutive dates of hearing. On 12.08.2025, the following order was passed;- “None present for the applicant/complainant. Same is the position since 31.12.2024. It appears that applicant/complainant is not interested to proceed with the instant Criminal Revision Application. As an indulgence and in the interest of justice, let notice be issued to the applicant/complainant through SHO PS Baradi Jatoi and notice of intimation be sent to counsel for the applicant/complainant. To come up on 27.08.2025.” The continuous absence on the part of the applicant and his Counsel prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Criminal Revision Application has been served or they have lost interest to proceed with the same. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
